function.description: Add or update a dish in the restaurant's catalog. Each dish must have a unique name, category, price, discount factor, nutritional tags, taste profile, allergens, and nutrition facts.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

discount.description: Discount factor: final amount = price * discount.

function.description: Remove a dish from the catalog by its exact name.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Update the price of an existing dish in the catalog.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Update the discount factor for an existing dish.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Retrieve detailed numeric nutrition facts for a specific dish by name. These numeric nutrition facts do not indicate nutritional characteristic tags, e.g., high_protein, low_fat, high_sugar, or low_sugar.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Retrieve tax rate for a specific dish by name.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Retrieve allergen information for a specific individual dish by dish name. Do not pass a set meal name to this tool. If an order item is a set meal, first call get_set_meal_details to retrieve its included dishes, then call get_dish_allergens for those included individual dish names.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Retrieve the taste profile (e.g., sweet, spicy) for a specific dish by name.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Get only the current shelf price (including tax) for a specific dish by name.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Get only the current discount factor for a specific dish by name. Discount factor is a price multiplier: lower factor means a larger discount; when asked for the highest/largest/biggest discount rate, choose the minimum discount factor.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: List dishes by category. For pasta/noodles, use 'Italian Pasta' for Annie and 'Pasta' for Mediterranean.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Find dish names with the specified nutritional tag. Returned names are dishes, not categories.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Find all dishes that match a specific taste profile (e.g., 'spicy', 'sweet').

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Find dish names whose allergen list contains the specified allergen. This tool is only for candidate discovery/filtering. Do not use it to add/remove items, compute totals, or infer price, discount, nutrition, taste, tax, or order state. Use specific get/compute/order tools for those facts and actions.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Add one or more servings of a dish to a user's current order. Order is keyed by user_id and restaurant.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Remove a specified quantity of a dish from a user's current order. If the user asks to remove an item/dish from the order without specifying a quantity, use the dish's current order quantity so the whole order item is removed; use a smaller or specific quantity only when explicitly requested.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Clear all items from a user's current order for a specific restaurant.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Retrieve all items in a user's current order for a specific restaurant, including individual dishes and set meals. Each returned item includes item_type ('dish' or 'set_meal'); for total nutrition, payment, or tax calculations, pass set meal names directly to the compute tool without expanding them; if item_type is 'set_meal' and the task asks about allergens, tags, included dishes, or component-level nutrition, call get_set_meal_details before deciding. item_type is informational only; do not pass item_type into compute, add, or remove tool parameters. For compute_total_* tools, pass only dish_name and quantity for each order item.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.
Name of the restaurant.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user

dishes.description: List of dishes to calculate total payment for

quantity.description: Quantity of the dish to purchase

dish_name.description: Name of the dish or set meal. If the current order item is a set meal, pass the set meal name as one item; do not expand it into included dishes unless the user explicitly asks to calculate set meal components separately.

description: Compute total payable amount for the specified dishes: sum(tax-inclusive price * discount * qty). The returned total_payment is already tax-inclusive; do not add compute_total_tax to total_payment. compute_total_tax only reports the tax portion included inside total_payment. If a set meal has no set_meal_price, it is priced from its included dishes. The dishes list may contain both individual dish names and set meal names. If the final order contains a set meal, pass the set meal name as one item and do not expand it into included dishes.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user

dishes.description: List of dishes to calculate total tax for

quantity.description: Quantity of the dish to purchase

dish_name.description: Name of the dish or set meal. If the current order item is a set meal, pass the set meal name as one item; do not expand it into included dishes unless the user explicitly asks to calculate set meal components separately.

description: Compute total tax amount for the specified dishes. Since price is tax-inclusive, tax per item = (price * tax_rate / (1 + tax_rate)) * discount * qty. The dishes list may contain both individual dish names and set meal names. If the final order contains a set meal, pass the set meal name as one item and do not expand it into included dishes.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user

dishes.description: List of dishes to calculate total nutrition values for

quantity.description: Quantity of the dish to purchase

dish_name.description: Name of the dish or set meal. If the current order item is a set meal, pass the set meal name as one item; do not expand it into included dishes unless the user explicitly asks to calculate set meal components separately.

description: Compute total nutrition values for the specified dishes. The dishes list may contain both individual dish names and set meal names. If the final order contains a set meal, pass the set meal name as one item and do not expand it into included dishes.

function.description: Return a list of all dish names that currently have a discount factor less than 1.0 for a specific restaurant.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Find all dishes with a price within a specified inclusive range for a specific restaurant.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Create a new set meal by combining existing dishes. The set meal will have a fixed name, a composite price, and a discount factor.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Retrieve the composition, price, and discount of a set meal by its name.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Add a pre-defined set meal to a user's order. The set meal is treated as a single item with its own price and discount.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Find all set meals that include a specific dish by name.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.

function.description: Remove a specified quantity of a pre-defined set meal from a user's order. The set meal is treated as a single item with its own price and discount. If the user asks to remove a set meal/item from the order without specifying a quantity, use the set meal's current order quantity so the whole order item is removed; use a smaller or specific quantity only when explicitly requested.

restaurant_name.description: Name of the restaurant. Use the canonical database restaurant name from enum; remove color/layout descriptors from user wording.
